name: RansomLeak Human Risk
description: Human-risk telemetry from RansomLeak: training completion, overdue coverage, per-team human-risk score, and phishing and smishing simulation outcomes.

pages.name: Human Risk Overview
pages.description: Training completion, overdue coverage, and per-team human-risk score.

rawConfiguration.text:
## RansomLeak Human Risk Overview

Training completion, overdue coverage, and per-team human risk, next to the New Relic signals that triggered each assignment. [Set up the integration](https://ransomleak.com/integrations/).

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE status = 'completed') AS 'Completion %' FROM RansomLeakTraining SINCE 30 days ago
SELECT uniqueCount(userKey) AS 'Users overdue' FROM RansomLeakTraining WHERE status = 'overdue' SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'Modules auto-assigned' FROM RansomLeakTraining WHERE triggerSource = 'newrelic-workflow' SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT latest(ransomleak.human_risk_score) FROM Metric FACET team TIMESERIES SINCE 30 days ago
SELECT count(*) FROM RansomLeakTraining WHERE status = 'assigned' FACET category SINCE 30 days ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE status = 'completed') AS 'Completion %' FROM RansomLeakTraining FACET team SINCE 30 days ago
SELECT latest(userEmail) AS 'User', latest(team) AS 'Team', uniqueCount(moduleSlug) AS 'Overdue modules' FROM RansomLeakTraining WHERE status = 'overdue' FACET userKey SINCE 30 days ago LIMIT 100

pages.name: Phishing & Smishing
pages.description: Phishing and smishing simulation outcomes by channel, team, and time.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE outcome = 'clicked') AS 'Click %' FROM RansomLeakPhishing WHERE channel = 'email' SINCE 90 days ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE outcome = 'reported') AS 'Report %' FROM RansomLeakPhishing WHERE channel = 'email' SINCE 90 days ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE outcome = 'clicked' OR outcome = 'submitted') AS 'Smishing fail %' FROM RansomLeakPhishing WHERE channel = 'sms' SINCE 90 days ago

widgets.title: Click vs report rate over time (email)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE outcome = 'clicked') AS 'Click %', percentage(count(*), WHERE outcome = 'reported') AS 'Report %' FROM RansomLeakPhishing WHERE channel = 'email' TIMESERIES SINCE 90 days ago
SELECT count(*) FROM RansomLeakPhishing FACET outcome SINCE 90 days ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE outcome = 'clicked') AS 'Click %' FROM RansomLeakPhishing WHERE channel = 'email' FACET team SINCE 90 days ago
